source_pr.title: plan: fix a but about limit pushdown
source_pr.body: When the read way is double read and the data is scanned by order, limit shouldn't be pushed to table side.

symptoms: sql: "select * from t where b = 1 and c = 1 order by c limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t where b = 1 and c = 1 order by c limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t where b = 1 and c = 1 order by c limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
